dj_text: Magic! FEX - Subways of Your Mind (The Most Mysterious Song on the Internet) [Bardcore] becomes Come On Feel The Noize [Bardcore | Medieval version]! One more left in the queue.

recovery_text: They're gone. We're back. Don't ask which 'they' — you don't want to know.
